creator: oz@nixil.net
text:
Compilation of k3b-kde4 fails to build when ffmpeg-devel is installed..

Fix: patch adapted from http://sources.gentoo.org/cgi-bin/viewvc.cgi/gentoo-x86/app-cdr/k3b/files/k3b-2.0.2-ffmpeg.patch?revision=1.1
	Author: Michal Malek <michalm [at] jabster.pl>
How-To-Repeat: 	build with ffmpeg-devel installed.
